Design: posit_encoder
Error line: 61

Original code:
assign out_m = inf_final|zero_final|(~DSR_left_out[2*(N-es)]) ? {inf_final,{N-1{1'b0}}} : {ls, tmp1_oN_m[N-1:1]};

Erroneous code:
assign out_m = inf_final|zero_final|(~DSR_left_out[2*(N-es)]) ? {inf_final,{N-1{1'b1}}} : {ls, tmp1_oN_m[N-1:1]};

Error description:
1'b0 changed to 1'b1

==================================================
